tutorials.title: Subpatch Boundary
tutorials.summary: Open a current 0.1 project whose patch library materializes a p scale_twice node.
tutorials.description: Shows core.inlet and core.outlet defining the external contract for a project-owned patch definition.

tutorials.title: Live Help Subpatch
tutorials.summary: Use a live-help node that opens a real current 0.1 help patch.
tutorials.description: Documents the help patch lookup surface for a Manual topic backed by a patch-library definition.

tutorials.title: Live Help Graph Fragment
tutorials.summary: Copy a selected current 0.1 graph fragment from a volatile help working copy.
tutorials.description: Shows help source, help working copy, copyable fragment, and promote-to-project paste operation metadata.
